titlestmt.titleproper: First Methodist Episcopal Church of Konana records6089
titlestmt.author: Compiled by S.L.

publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2021-08-16 18:37:42 UTC.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: First Methodist Episcopal Church of Konana records

origination.label: creator
origination.corpname: First Methodist Episcopal Church of Konana (Konana, N.Y.)

did.abstract: One volume of a preprinted register containing lists of baptisms, marriages, probationers, members and classes.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

bioghist.head: ORGANIZATIONAL HISTORY
bioghist.p: Very little is known about this congregation except that they purchased a church, formerly owned by the Christian and Universalists, at a sheriff's sale and were later given the Presbyterian church after that congregation became defunct.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: This collection consists of a one volume pre-printed register containing lists of baptisms, marriages, probationers, members and classes.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: First Methodist Episcopal Church of Konana records, #6089. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

controlaccess.geogname: Steuben County (N.Y.) -- Religious life and customs.
controlaccess.subject: Methodist Episcopal Church -- New York (State) -- Konana.
Church records and registers -- New York (State) -- Konana.
Methodist church buildings.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: East Genesee Conference Methodist Episcopal Church commencing A.D. 1861, 1861-1892

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Lists date, name of person baptised, date of birth, residence, officiating minister and witnesses.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Lists date, name of parties, their residences, place of marriage, officiating minister, and witnesses.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Lists date, name, condition (married, single, widowed), residence, class leader and remarks.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Name, residence, time and mode of joining, class leader and remarks (death or other form of removal often indicated.)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Members, leader, where class meets and remarks for 1-4 classes. (Often indicates form of removal. Revised periodically.)
